data.title: David Sacks: There is no discussion of selling reserves such as gold to buy Bitcoin, but is willing to buy more Bitcoin in a budget-neutral way
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that David Sacks, director of encryption and AI at the White House, issued a statement before the cryptocurrency summit: "The United States should have established Bitcoin reserves long ago. But our country has not developed a long-term strategy and has lost billions of dollars. Federal departments will immediately audit crypto assets and initiate the process of creating BTC reserves and crypto inventories. There is no discussion of selling reserve assets such as gold to buy more Bitcoin, but we are willing to buy more Bitcoin in a budget-neutral manner. This decision will be made by the Secretary of the Treasury and the Secretary of Commerce."

data.title: Market Anxiety Reflects Economic Uncertainty Amid Tariff Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Oliver Pursche, Senior Vice President at Wealthspire Advisors in New York, commented on the current market conditions, highlighting the anxiety and insecurity faced by investors. He noted that U.S. President Donald Trump's unpredictable actions regarding tariffs contribute to this uncertainty. Pursche pointed out the inconsistency in tariff policies, with changes ranging from imposing tariffs to suspending or exempting them. He expressed concern that describing the economic situation as strong might be misleading, as there are clear signs of economic slowdown. Inflation remains a significant issue and could worsen depending on tariff developments.

data.title: SOL breaks through 150 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 4.81%
data.description: OKX market shows that SOL has broken through 150 USDT and is now at 150.06 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 4.81%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Market analysis: Powell's statement that the economy is in good shape is somewhat misleading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Oliver Pursche, senior vice president of Wealthspire Advisors in New York, said that Powell's speech reflects the anxiety and insecurity that every investor is facing now, and the market also reflects this anxiety and insecurity. It seems that no one can discern what Trump will do next. There are tariffs, and there are no tariffs. There are suspensions of tariffs and exemptions. I think it is a bit misleading to say that the economic situation is good, because the economy is obviously slowing down, and inflation is obviously still a problem, and it may get worse, depending on the situation of tariffs and other aspects. (Jinshi)

data.title: David Marcus to Attend Inaugural White House Crypto Summit
data.description: According to Odaily, David Marcus, former head of Meta's crypto division and co-founder and CEO of Lightspark, announced on social media platform X that he has been invited to participate in the first White House Crypto Summit.

data.title: The three major U.S. stock indexes turned positive after Powell's speech
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The three major U.S. stock indexes all turned positive after Powell's speech, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average up 0.3%, the S&P 500 up 0.2%, and the Nasdaq up 0.2%. (Jinshi)

data.title: FOX reporter reveals the latest list of participants in the White House Crypto Summit
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News FOX Business reporter Eleanor Terrett disclosed the latest list of the Crypto Summit, including:
Tom Emmer (House Majority Whip)
Bryan Steil (Chairman of the House Digital Assets Subcommittee)
Chris Dixon (a16z partner)
Fred Thiel (CEO of mining company Mara)
Mike Belshe (BitGo CEO)
Brad Garlinghouse (Ripple CEO)
Chris Giancarlo (Former CFTC Chairman)
Raghu Yarlagadda (FalconX CEO)
Nathan McCauley (Anchorage Digital CEO)
Kris (Crypto.com CEO)
Cameron Winklevoss and Tyler Winklevoss (Gemini founders)
Vlad Tenev (Co-founder and CEO of Robinhood)
Arjun Sethi (Kraken CEO)
Michael Saylor (Founder of Strategy)
Brian Armstrong (Co-founder and CEO of Coinbase)
Jonathan Steinberg (WisdomTree CEO)
Sergey Nazarov (Chainlink Co-founder)
Kyle Samani (Multicoin Managing Partner)
Zach Witkoff (WLFI Co-founder)
JP Richardson (Exodus CEO)
Matt Huang (Paradigm Co-founder)
David Bailey (Bitcoin Magazine CEO)

data.title: Bitcoin Bill Writer Cynthia Lummis Misses White House Crypto Summit Due to Illness
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Cynthia Lummis, a Wyoming state representative and Bitcoin bill drafter, posted on X that she would miss the White House Crypto Summit due to pneumonia and would complete the drafting of the bill as soon as possible and submit it to Trump.

data.title: Dormant Whale Deposits 2,325 BNB to Binance After 5 Years, Holding $1.4M
data.description: On March 8, Onchain Lens reported that a BNB whale who had been inactive for five years suddenly deposited 2,325 BNB (~$1.4 million) to Binance.The whale’s initial BNB acquisition cost was $15.28 per token, meaning they now hold a substantial profit given BNB’s current price above $600.2019 Position: 40,099 BNB deposited, worth $802,000 at the time.2025 Profit Calculation: At current prices, their holdings have increased in value by over 10x, yielding $1.56 million in profits.
